review_text_liked: We spent two days at Pondok Nyoman and loved our stay!💖 The location is perfect — not far from the main road, yet peacefully hidden in the greenery with a breathtaking view of the rice terraces and mountains. The Pondok Nyoman team is friendly, always ready to help, and truly makes you feel at home. One evening, we asked if we could order something from the menu even though the kitchen was already closed. Just five minutes later — in the rain — a plate of fruit was delivered straight to our house. That says so much about the kindness of the owner and Mr. Nyoman’s team 🙌 There are also many sightseeing spots nearby — waterfalls, temples, rice fields, and more — making it very easy to plan activities for 2–5 days in the area.

review_text_liked: The views are beautiful, and the place itself is quite magical, like a village on the side of a road. The room is adequate, the bathroom large, and clean. There's a hint of damp, but that's the nature of this place—in the mountains, it's humid. The owner and staff are very helpful and kind. I really appreciate that.
review_text_disliked: There's an unpleasant smell in the bathroom. Keep in mind that the place is located in the mountains, in a small village, surrounded by rice fields and a main road, but there's probably nowhere to eat (without a scooter). There's a kitchen on site, and you can order food and drinks, as well as buy water or soft drinks. Unfortunately, we didn't really like the food here (apart from the soup). The menu, marked as vegan, has eggs in most dishes... We also informed them of our dietary restrictions, but no one took them into account. We had to change our orders several times.The prices listed on the menu do not include taxes or service. So, you don't really know how much you'll pay.

review_title: Super find!! A piece of paradise at an excellent price!!
review_text_liked: The view was absolutely gorgeous. From the start to the very end, the service and staff were amazing. Our bags got brought to our car and taken back (the entry path was long and narrow). There small details made all the difference: the water cooker with coffee/tea in the room, the comfortable beds, the large shower with lovely shampoo and shower gel, the thick towels. We had plenty of room for our suitcases in our room, drying areas, a private sitting area outside of our room - it couldn’t have been better. Infinity pool made for the most lovely view and a beautiful cooldown after a long day out and about. Breakfast was delicious and beautiful, served on a rooftop. We didn’t eat dinner there, but our driver had a pizza and said it was really good. The price (for being at a hotel in the middle of nowhere) was also excellent. It felt like we were in a small paradise - all the attention to detail and the love put into the place, could really be felt. Waking up to the view of the rice terraces was most certainly a once in a lifetime experience. I can absolutely recommend this rare find to anyone in the area - very much worth it!!

review_title: Probably the nicest and most peaceful getaway I've ever visited.
review_text_liked: The view from my room and its large verandah was inspiring, overlooking rice terraces and a green valley to distant mountains. The layout and location of the place was mesmerizing, it was peaceful and expansive, with paths bordered by fish ponds, statuettes and fascinating plants. This has to be the most satisfying place in which I have stayed during my travels, and I look forward to returning. The food was nice and the staff were exceptional. It's worth spending some time with Nyoman, he is a fascinating host.
review_text_disliked: It was difficult connecting with my transport leaving Bedugal, there was confusion as to where to meet my bus to Ubud. Visitors need clear directions about pickup locations and timetable.

owner_resp_text: Dear Susie, Thank you so much for your wonderful review! We are thrilled to hear that you enjoyed your stay at Pondok Nyoman and found our hotel to have "the best view in the area." It’s fantastic to know that you appreciated not only our stunning rice terrace views from the pool and dining areas but also our comfortable rooms. We take great pride in providing excellent service, so we’re delighted that our staff made a positive impression during your visit. Your kind words about our food offerings and the relaxing ambiance created by our lush plants truly warm our hearts. We understand that navigating the steps can be a consideration for some guests; however, we believe they contribute to making each room special with breathtaking views. We appreciate your feedback regarding nearby amenities as well, as it helps us continue improving guest experiences. Thank you once again for sharing your thoughts! We look forward to welcoming you back for an even longer stay in the future—there’s always more relaxation waiting here at Pondok Nyoman! Best regards, Osin - Reservations

review_text_liked: We had the best accommodation experience of our Bali trip at Nyoman's guest house. Their place is a true oasis, where every detail is carefully thought out to provide an incredible experience for guests. The room was spacious and the bathroom was sparkling clean. We were impressed by the kindness and helpfulness of Nyoman and his team, always attentive to our needs. The food served was simply amazing, with delicious meals for breakfast, lunch, and dinner. Additionally, we appreciated being able to rent a scooter directly on site, which made getting around much easier. The atmosphere of the place is truly unique, surrounded by lush nature. We can't wait to stay at Nyoman's again on our next trip to Bali!

review_title: Wow, what a hidden gem in the middle of the jungle
review_text_liked: Wow, where should I start? This was by far one of the most beautiful accommodations I ever stayed in and I am lucky enough to have stayed in many. The room was really big and the huge double bed was really comfortable. Bathroom was really big and a semi outdoor bathroom. Sink was big, they even provided tooth paste, and the water pressure and temperature were amazing. Really trustworthy amazing, outgoing staff and everyone so friendly, especially Nyoman the owner. Views and Pool was just out of this world. Such a beautiful property in the middle of the jungle surrounded by nature. Views onto a rice terrace and a mountain. The food (breakfast and dinner) was really delicious and reasonably priced. Great seating areas for breakfast and dinner. They put some really cute flower decorations as part of our honeymoon for us and provided us with some really sweet snacks. The hospitality was out of this world. Location was walking distance to some local warungs and supermarkets however in a really quiet area, so just be aware. Very easy to get taxis from there though. The area was quite safe and they had an on-call taxi and massage service which both was fairly priced and really great service. Unlimited free tea, water and coffee which was a nice bonus. Overall would highly recommend. Such a hidden gem and so close to all main attractions by max 30 mins taxi rides each. Thanks for the lovely stay Nyoman and team.
review_text_disliked: Room was a bit outdated and the towels we got on our first day were a bit smelly (mold smell). There was a power cut once but it was fixed within 10 minutes. Our room also did not have water on one of the mornings however upon telling the staff they fixed it immediately. In the pool unfortunately there were some water spiders in there which was a bit scary for me. We didn't tell the staff since this is nature at the end of the day and we figured out our own solution instead. Pool temperature was nice and cool. There were lots of mosquitoes around which again you have to expect in the middle of the jungle. The residential dogs are really sweet however I once got a coffee in the middle of the night (my fault) and they almost wanted to attack me but again this was kinda to expect.

review_title: Brilliant place to stay away from the crowds
review_text_liked: Views from the property were outstanding! The pool area is brilliant, lots of places to sit and chill and take in the views and it's so peaceful. The rooftop area is great as well for sitting and taking in the views. Good sized room and bathroom, nice to have a little seating area outside your room too. Really friendly staff - the two young housekeepers were very sweet. You can also rent a bike from them too to see the local attractions.
review_text_disliked: The food at the on site restaurant could be improved - often it was served lukewarm with very little seasoning. Portion sizes could also be bigger (would be willing to pay a little more for this) and would expect to have more vegetables on the vegetarian options. Towels need replacing, they seem old and smell fusty. Tried to arrange a massage with reception, they said they would confirm with us but never did, which was a shame as it's a very calm environment so would have been nice!

review_text_liked: The people there were very friendly. Amazingly beautiful ground. Super well-kept. The view from the room as well as the rooftop was unbeatable. The room was without AC but with the fan the temperature at night was still nice. Shower pressure was great. Hot water ran well. The pool was small but it was enough to cool down during the day. The guest house was located around 100 m from the car park but the walk there was quite nice among the rice paddies. The walk down to our room felt like a thousand stairs (haha!) but it won't be an issue if you have good health unlike me. I still love the place although I carefully planned our schedule and stuff so that I wouldn't need to go up and down. There were a number of dogs there but our favourite was Popo. My son loves him. So adorable!
review_text_disliked: The breakfast was nice but could be better. Car park can only accomodate 2 cars.

review_text_disliked: They could have a better selection of meals available as it gets a bit boring. The ‘French toast’ is just normal toast so I would avoid that. The room had a bit of a damp smell and only had 1 pillow. The towels and bed sheets all had stains/holes in them. The area is in the middle of no where a bit so you can’t really get ‘grabs’ (their version of Uber). The owner charged us a lot more for the lift compared to ‘grab’ prices. The gym was not good, it had 1 multi gym only.

review_text_liked: The place is absolutely beautiful, secluded, tranquil, and right in the middle of nature. Incredible views!! All of the people that worked there were lovely and they couldn't be any kinder or more helpful. Nyoman arranged a driver for us, a lovely local man called Jaya. We had a wonderful day with him exploring the highlights of the area, temples, botanical gardens and beautiful waterfalls. Due to the location we couldn't organise our own taxi's etc so Nyoman himself kindly drove us to our next destination and insured we got there safely and on time. The food, although simple, is tasty and made with love and is great value for money.
review_text_disliked: The only comment I have is that the bed was very firm. .

review_text_liked: The location and the views are hard to beat. The owner has made sure the rice fields and the hills are visible from all terraces and there are plenty of comfy spots you can sit and relax, watching these amazing surroundings. There is a great chilled out atmosphere - the whole place is very boutique, with lots of greenery, bird cages, fish pinds and temples around. Nyoman and his staff (mainly family and friends) made us feel at home and were super helpful organising trips or laundry. Yaja, the driver, took us to local waterfalls and hot springs with almost no tourists. They do very good food too, banana pancakes and springs rolls were our favourites! We have stayed for four nights and wish we had longer to enjoy it. The kids loved it a lot, especially that they have made friends with other children staying there. Great place!

review_title: Very upsetting experience – we left the same day
review_text_liked: Nice view from the room.
review_text_disliked: We decided to leave this place just a few hours after arriving. The main and overwhelming reason: the sight of poor dogs tightly chained on short metal chains near the reception, with visible wounds on their necks. It was truly heartbreaking and hard to look at. These animals were clearly suffering, and no one seemed to care. HOW CAN YOU HAVE NO HEART FOR ANIMALS – AND CLAIM TO CARE FOR YOUR GUESTS? To the owners: free those poor dogs. This is not just wrong — it’s inhumane. That image will stay with us for a long time. Our hearts ached seeing them like that. As for the stay itself — the room was simple but acceptable. However, there was no air conditioning, only a small fan, and the area was full of mosquitoes, which made it difficult to rest. The food was greasy and not to our taste. The property is also quite isolated, located down a dirt road far from the main street, and it’s difficult to get a taxi nearby. On top of that, just before we checked out, one of the bungalows hosted a loud party, adding even more discomfort. The only positive was the view of the rice fields — but absolutely nothing can make up for the mistreatment of animals we witnessed. We strongly advise others to avoid this place!

review_text_disliked: It was a bit hard to access - the road there is just a walking trail at the end. The quality of the breakfast and food in general was pretty average.

review_text_liked: The views are great, especially at sunset. Free tea and coffee and enjoyable meals.
review_text_disliked: We realised on the last night that the pillows and duvet were covered with mould and actually quite damp. We went in April so it was a wet month, however they still need to be replaced if mouldy, not passed on knowingly to the next guest. Once we arrived at our next accommodation, we needed to clean our clothes again as they smelt of mould. The place itself is incredibly remote, so do bear that in mind if you don't have a scooter. Outside taxis are very tough to come by around there, and if you are not able to get one, the only option is to be driven by the people who run the place, which will be very expensive and restrictive as you don't have any other choice. Just something to bear in mind, especially if you are a solo traveller.

review_text_disliked: One of the rooms given to us smelt strongly of mould. The place is filled with lots of stuff and plants, and somehow it turned out more cluttered than what we expected from photos. The dining staff didn't seem to be prompt in cleaning up the plates as we noticed the cutleries were left uncleared hours after the diners had left. Terrace had a good view for dinners, but it's not near kitchen. Staff did not come up to take orders, so every time you need to go down to ask for something. One of the tables had stools which looked like from rat (and this was at 6pm) and no one seemed to manage the cleanliness. Fairly disappointed by overall state of place.

review_text_liked: We only liked the views that you can have from the property and the staff which was pretty friendly. Also the possibility to rent a scooter directly from there at a cheap price.
review_text_disliked: We had a room with mold everywhere : in the shower, in the pillows and god knows where. The smell in the room was unbearable and the sheets were feeling wet and cold during the night. I also found a mini anthill in a corner next to entrance door. Due to all of the above, we couldn’t sleep in the first night so next morning we decided to leave the property even though the money paid for the second night were lost. It’s the worst experience I had … ever. I don’t recommend.

owner_resp_text: Dear Olga, Thank you for taking the time to share your review. Regarding the car parking, it is available however the capacity is limited and we appreciate your comments regarding parking facilities and the narrow road conditions for biking. Your insights are invaluable as we continually strive to enhance our guests' experiences. We will certainly take this into consideration as we explore potential improvements in these areas. Thank you once again for your review, and we hope to welcome you back in the future! Warm Regards, Asti - Pondok Nyoman

owner_resp_text: Dear Jakub, Thank you for taking the time to share your experience with Pondok Nyoman Bedugul. We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed our amazing pool and its beautiful countryside view, as well as our food offerings. It is always rewarding to know that our guests appreciate these aspects of their stay. However, we sincerely apologize for the issues you encountered regarding your room. A musty smell and an uncomfortable mattress are certainly not reflective of our standards, and we understand how this impacted your overall experience. Please rest assured that we will address these concerns with our housekeeping team and evaluate our bedding options to ensure a more comfortable stay for future guests. Your feedback is invaluable in helping us improve our services. We hope you will consider staying with us again so we can provide you with a flawless experience next time. Warm regards, Asti - Pondok Nyoman Bedugul

review_text_liked: Struttura familiare tranquilla anche se molto grande, con architettura tipica balinese e una vista bellissima. La camera aveva buoni standard di pulizia ed era più ampia della media delle camere che ho incontrato in Indonesia. Piccolo balconcino con poltrona per rilassarsi e godersi la vista o il fresco (si fa per dire) serale.
review_text_disliked: La struttura non è direttamente raggiungibile in macchina, quindi ti lasciano a circa 150m di distanza che possono essere disagevoli da percorrere su una stradina dissestata, con trolley grandi, con ruote logore e sotto la pioggia. Inoltre ci sono parecchie scale per raggiungere le varie zone della struttura così che, se hai i trolley di cui sopra, arrivi bello provato. La struttura offre colazione e pasti a parte con prezzi che ho trovato particolarmente alti nonostante la buona qualità del cibo.

Dans notre voyage, Pondok Nyoman était juste une petite étape d'une nuit pour visiter la cascade Nung Nung, les rizières Jatiluwih, Ulun Danu Beratan et le Secret Garden. Le logement était à maximum 30min de ses lieux, parfait en scooter (qui sont louables sur place). Ils proposent également de la restauration sur place et sont très arrangeants !

review_text_liked: Un grande punto di forza della struttura è Nyoman, che rende ogni ospite parte della famiglia. Noi abbiamo avuto la fortuna di partecipare ad una cerimonia nel tempio del villaggio insieme a lui che ci ha fatto da guida e ci ha spiegato come svolgere la preghiera passo dopo passo, è stata un’esperienza indescrivibile che ci ha immerso nella vera cultura balinese. La struttura è molto curata e accogliente, Nyoman ci ha raccontato l’evoluzione del Pondok negli anni che è in continua trasformazione e crescita. Noi avevamo la prima camera costruita, la numero 1, molto spaziosa, con un letto comodissimo e un bagno decisamente grande e confortevole. Lo staff è molto cordiale e pronto a rispondere ad ogni richiesta, noi abbiamo approfittato dell’ottima cucina sia per la colazione che per la cena o la merenda e siamo rimasti molto soddisfatti sia per i sapori ma anche del prezzo. Il servizio lavanderia è stato ottimo. La posizione del Pondok è molto comoda per raggiungere le zone di interesse delle montagne centrali e del nord di Bali come il tempio di Pura Ulun Danu Bratan, le cascate di Sekumpul, i laghi gemelli, le risaie di Jatiluwih. È possibile raggiungere la struttura in scooter e parcheggiare all’interno.
review_text_disliked: Noi non abbiamo avuto nessun problema durante il soggiorno però qualcun’altro potrebbe riscontrare alcune problematiche: - la stradina per raggiungere il pondok è molto stretta, ci passa solo uno scooter alla volta, e se si arriva in macchina bisogna portare/farsi portare le valigie a mano fino alla struttura - ci sono numerosi galli che cantano più o meno costantemente dall’alba al tramonto, è un suono che personalmente non ci ha infastidito e del quale ci siamo abituati in fretta ma può non essere così per tutti - in diverse occasioni abbiamo sentito uno sgradevole odore in stanza che arrivava da mucchi di plastica e sterpaglie bruciati all’esterno, nella zona in costruzione, credo che sia stato un evento occasionale proprio per i lavori in corso
full_review: title: Vivere un’autentica esperienza balinese. liked: Un grande punto di forza della struttura è Nyoman, che rende ogni ospite parte della famiglia. Noi abbiamo avuto la fortuna di partecipare ad una cerimonia nel tempio del villaggio insieme a lui che ci ha fatto da guida e ci ha spiegato come svolgere la preghiera passo dopo passo, è stata un’esperienza indescrivibile che ci ha immerso nella vera cultura balinese. La struttura è molto curata e accogliente, Nyoman ci ha raccontato l’evoluzione del Pondok negli anni che è in continua trasformazione e crescita. Noi avevamo la prima camera costruita, la numero 1, molto spaziosa, con un letto comodissimo e un bagno decisamente grande e confortevole. Lo staff è molto cordiale e pronto a rispondere ad ogni richiesta, noi abbiamo approfittato dell’ottima cucina sia per la colazione che per la cena o la merenda e siamo rimasti molto soddisfatti sia per i sapori ma anche del prezzo. Il servizio lavanderia è stato ottimo. La posizione del Pondok è molto comoda per raggiungere le zone di interesse delle montagne centrali e del nord di Bali come il tempio di Pura Ulun Danu Bratan, le cascate di Sekumpul, i laghi gemelli, le risaie di Jatiluwih. È possibile raggiungere la struttura in scooter e parcheggiare all’interno. disliked: Noi non abbiamo avuto nessun problema durante il soggiorno però qualcun’altro potrebbe riscontrare alcune problematiche: - la stradina per raggiungere il pondok è molto stretta, ci passa solo uno scooter alla volta, e se si arriva in macchina bisogna portare/farsi portare le valigie a mano fino alla struttura - ci sono numerosi galli che cantano più o meno costantemente dall’alba al tramonto, è un suono che personalmente non ci ha infastidito e del quale ci siamo abituati in fretta ma può non essere così per tutti - in diverse occasioni abbiamo sentito uno sgradevole odore in stanza che arrivava da mucchi di plastica e sterpaglie bruciati all’esterno, nella zona in costruzione, credo che sia stato un evento occasionale proprio per i lavori in corso.

review_text_liked: Prachtig uitzicht, veel zithoekjes en terrasjes. Ze helpen je graag met vervoer en taxi, wij hadden alles al gefixt en konden op extra advies rekenen, zeker niet opdringerig, zeer aangenaam personeel, familaire sfeer zelfs. Bedden iets beter dan andere verblijven, het zwembad zorgde voor verfrissing na uitstap, enig minpuntje: het zwembadwater was niet zo helder. Wij hadden geen last van muggen en vliegen, het geluid van gecco en hun aanwezigheid overal had wat Charme. Het eten is daar dik ok, je moet je echt niet in het donker naar andere warung begeven, je bent elders meer geld kwijt voor minder kwaliteit. Personeel staat heel de dag klaar, koffie, thee en water is zelfs gratis.
review_text_disliked: Niets. Comentaar van anderen wel te begrijpen want snachts veel geluid van honden en om 4u al hanengekraai maar dat los je op met oordopjes. De weg naar hotel is wat minder maar ze helpen je meteen om je bagage tot daar te krijgen.

review_text_liked: Prachtige locatie, ver gezichten over rijst, berg en groente teelt. Huisjes zijn terrasvormig opgebouwd. Uiterst vriendelijke mensen die je overal behulpzaam in zijn. Eigenaar maakt een gezellige praatje en is oprecht geïnteresseerd. Ontbijt en diner kan men daar nuttigen - smakelijk en goedkoop. Kleine koelkast met frisdrank en Bintang. - tegen betaling mag men hier uit pakken. Infinity pool - behoorlijk veel chloor.
review_text_disliked: Je hebt echt een scooter of chauffeur nodig - zij hebben zelf een scooter verhuur en eigen chauffeurs in dienst (spreken redelijk engels en veel geleerd over hun cultuur en gedachtegoed). - restaurants niet echt in de buurt - paar warangs die om 17.00 sluiten? Handdoeken zijn echt aan vervanging toe - bevlekt en versleten. (bedden zijn goed en schoon, kamers ook)

Les chambres se trouvent dans un très beau jardin, avec de nombreux bassins à carpes et de jolies plantes, c'est très agréable. En bas de celui-ci il y a une piscine avec vue imprenable sur les rizières environnantes! Nos chambres étaient confortables, belle vue et au calme. Le propriétaire ainsi que le personnel sont très gentils et attentionnés. Nous avons beaucoup aimé notre séjour dans ce très bel endroit. Peu de restaurants autour, nous avons pris tous nos repas sur place, bonne nourriture à un prix raisonnable.

review_title: Une expérience unique, différente et sereine
review_text_liked: Petit oasis au coeur de la ville, on se sent chez soi tout de suite dans cet écrin de verdure ! Magnifique vue sur les rizières et personnel accueillant, le séjour a été une expérience à part entière : bonne cuisine, échanges avec le personnel, scooters facilement accessibles sur place, tout comme les massages..: on peut totalement déconnecter. En bonus, un séjour inclusif, nos hôtes nous ayant même emmenés au temple pour nous présenter leur religion et la façon dont elle est vécue par les Balinais et envers les autres. Une expérience unique !

review_text_liked: Die Unterkunft ist rundum liebevoll gestaltet. Es gibt sehr viele schöne Möglichkeiten, sich dort aufzuhalten, wie zB den Poolbereich oder die Dachterrasse. Man hat von all diesen Orten eine wunderschöne Aussicht auf den Berg und die Reisterrassen davor. Man kann vor Ort unkompliziert einen Roller mieten, um die Gegend zu erkunden. Abends kann man zu sehr fairen Preisen gut essen (wir empfehlen vor allem das Gado-Gado!!!). Der Gastgeber und seine Familie sind super liebe Menschen, die einem das Gefühl geben, willkommen zu sein. An unserem Abreisetag wurde uns gesagt, dass wir uns mit dem Auschecken so viel Zeit lassen können, wie wir brauchen. Das fanden wir sehr außergewöhnlich (im positiven Sinne). Außerdem wurden wir von einem sehr freundlichen Fahrer zu unserem nächsten Reiseziel gebracht.
review_text_disliked: Es war nicht in jeder Ecke blitzsauber und die Marmelade, die es zum Frühstück gab, war nicht wirklich Marmelade. Dies sind aber nur Kleinigkeiten, über die man bei dem Übernachtungspreis und auch wegen all der positiven Aspekte gut hinwegsehen kann!!

Mentre lasciavamo la struttura sono arrivati i proprietari e non si sono nemmeno scusati per l'accaduto.

review_text_liked: Cet hôtel est un rêve personnifié ! J'en ai pleuré à mon arrivée tellement tout est beau et paradisiaque. Ajoutez à cela un personnel plus que adorable et une chambre très confortable et voilà la recette de vacances inoubliables. L'emplacement est idéal à 20mn des rizières Jatiluwih, et 30mn du lac Bratan et son temple. A 1h d'Ubud ou de Munduk. Mention spéciale à la petite salle de sport toute mignonne vue rizières, et néanmoins bien équipée. La piscine à débordement est magnifique. La vue qu'on a de partout... juste incroyable. Les repas sont très bons aussi, j'ai adoré les bananes frites.
review_text_disliked: Le petit déjeuner commence à 8h seulement, c'est un peu tard pour attaquer la journée de visites.

review_text_liked: Die Aussicht auf die Reisfelder ist der Hammer! Die ganze Anlage ist sehr liebevoll angelegt, mit Pool, Mini-Gym, Rooftop, Massagebereich etc. Die Zimmer haben fast alle eine Terrasse mit Blick auf die Reisfelder. Das Zimmer selbst war groß und gemütlich und wurde jeden Tag frisch gemacht. Der Besitzer und alle Angestellten sind sehr freundlich! Das Frühstück war lecker und es wurde sogar auf Extrawünsche eingegangen. Unsere Wäsche wurde für 10k IDR pro kg gewaschen. Insgesamt haben wir uns sehr wohl gefühlt. Vom Ambiente und Ausblick her bisher eine der besten Unterkünfte auf unserer Reise!
review_text_disliked: Nur Kleinigkeiten. Das Bad hätte ein wenig sauberer sein können. Das Abendessen war in Ordnung, aber wenn wir mehr als 2 Abende geblieben wären, hätten wir uns vermutlich eher eine Alternative gesucht. Der Driver, den die Unterkunft anbietet ist überteuert - man ist jedoch aufgrund der Lage auf einen Driver angewiesen.

review_title: Prachtig verblijf in een klein echt paradijsje
review_text_liked: Het hartelijk ontvangst door de eigenaar nog zelf die met zoveel trots zijn prachtige complex die hijzelf nog heeft gebouwd op een fantastische locatie u zeer welkom doet voelen. Hij runt dit kleinschallig hotel samen met zijn familie waardoor je echt het gevoel krijgt bij hun thuis te zijn zoals een B&B. Eigenaar woont op het complex zelf. We hadden het voorrecht door hem ook gezegend te worden in zijn kleine thuistempel en daarna met zijn neefje een ceremonie bij te wonen in een nabije tempel. Kamers zijn ruim en proper en met een prachtig uitzicht. Zwembad met een fantastische uitzicht over de vallei en bergen. Er is ook een mogelijk om te eten die door zijn zus zelf nog wordt bereid tegen een zeer zacht prijsje. 10/10 top!
review_text_disliked: Niets alles was puur en echt top!

review_title: Hier fühlt man sich wie zu Hause :)
review_text_liked: Uns hat es hier an nichts gefehlt! Die Unterkunft ist sehr ruhig gelegen und perfekt, um ein bisschen zu entspannen. Die Zimmer sind sehr schön eingerichtet und der Blick auf die Reisterrassen ist unbezahlbar. Morgens und abends kann man auf dem Rooftop sitzen, sich das gute und preisgünstige Essen schmecken lassen und den Ausblick genießen. Alle Mitarbeiter sind sehr nett und für alle Fragen offen. Der Besitzer, Nyoman, ist einer der nettesten Menschen, die wir je getroffen haben - er hat mit uns einen Tagesausflug gemacht, uns schöne Orte auf Bali gezeigt - auch welche, die nicht alle Touristen kennen. Er hat uns viel über die Kultur erzählt und uns wie seine Freunde behandelt :). Es war einfach toll! Am nächsten Tag hat uns sein lieber Freund Jaya zur nächsten Unterkunft gebracht, uns auf dem Weg nach Ubud noch ein paar andere Sehenswürdigkeiten gezeigt und uns viel erzählt. Alles in allem empfehlen wir diese Unterkunft zu 100% weiter - Nyoman tut alles dafür, dass es seinen Gästen gut geht. Wir kommen irgendwann wieder :)!

review_title: pas cher et on sait pourquoi
review_text_liked: la vue sur la montagne et le côté atypique de l'endroit. mais j'ai plus de choses négatives à dire malheureusement.
review_text_disliked: l'odeur d'humidité dans la chambre était insupportable. on réserve pour 3 et on n'a qu'un lit 2 places. Ma fille de 17 ans a dû dormir par terre sur un matelas au bout du lit. chambre pas insonorisé. bruit d'eau toute la nuit ainsi que les coqs. le petit déjeuner très sommaire qu'on a attendu 45 minutes et on me demande un supplément pour ma fille alors que j'ai déjà payé pour 3 personnes. Heureusement ça s'est arrangé après. le chemin pour accéder n'est pas adapté pour des valises à roulettes. sinon vous abimez bien vos roulettes.

owner_resp_text: Dear Yann, Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback regarding your recent stay with us. We sincerely apologize for the disappointing experience you encountered during your visit. We are committed to providing a clean and comfortable environment for all our guests, and it is clear that we fell short in several areas during your stay. Your comments about the condition of the pool, deckchairs, and kitchen items have been noted with great concern. We understand how these issues impacted your overall enjoyment and regret that they led you to leave after just one night. Please be assured that we take matters like this seriously and will address them promptly with our maintenance and housekeeping teams. Your insights are invaluable as we strive to improve our facilities and ensure a better experience for future guests. Thank you once again for your feedback. Best regards, Osin - Reservations

review_text_liked: L'hôtel est vraiment très joli avec une vue incroyable sur les rizières. Les jardins sont superbes avec des bassins partout,la piscine donne sur les rizières. Décorations typiques. Possibilité de se faire masser pour vraiment pas cher, et restauration sur place même si assez chère pour le secteur. L'hôtel profite bien de son isolement.
review_text_disliked: Peu de personnel avec donc beaucoup d'attente au dîner et au petit déjeuner ( 45 min). Beaucoup d'humidité dans les chambres, les serviettes ne sèchent pas, l'odeur est assez désagréable dans la chambre. Le petit déjeuner trop léger et pas très bon.

review_text_liked: Krásný výhled, milý majitel
review_text_disliked: Bohužel hotel nemůžeme doporučit. K hotelu vede 100m pěšina mezi poli, nevyhovující na cestu s kufrem. Snídaně byla velice malá, je zde velké množství volně pobíhající zvěře - pes, kohouti, slepice, žáby, gekoni, myši. Kohout začíná kokrhat od 3 ráno. Co nedojíte tak na stůl vyskočí pes nebo slepice a sní zbytky. V ubytování je systém jezírek a vodopádů, na efekt krásné, bohužel celou noc slyšíte kapání vody. V oblasti je veliké vlhko, tím má vše tendence k plísním. Dřevěný nábytek je napadený broučky.

review_title: Würden wir nicht noch einmal buchen
review_text_liked: Schöne Urige Anlage mit tollen Blick und schön ruhig.
review_text_disliked: Leider nicht gut gepflegt. Insgesamt nicht nur das Zimmer. Im Zimmer ist alles sehr feucht gewesen und hat nicht nach sauberer Bettwäsche gerochen. Beim Massieren, wurden bei verschiedenen Gästen immer und immer wieder die selben Kissen, Handtücher und Sarongtücher verwendet, was darauf schließen lässt, dass es mit den Betten ähnlich gemacht wird. Hätten wir nicht unsere eigenen Moskitonetze und Bettwäsche mitgehabt, hätten wir darin nicht geschlafen.

owner_resp_text: Dear Claire, Thank you for writing us a review. We understand how frustrating it must have been dealing with accessibility challenges and the door lock issue, especially when it was beyond your control. Your feedback regarding our management team's interactions is also noted; we strive to foster a positive environment for both our guests and staff, and I will personally look into this matter. Regarding breakfast options, we are continuously working on enhancing our offerings, as well as exploring ways to improve comfort in our rooms—air conditioning is something we are considering based on guest feedback like yours. Lastly, I apologize for any disturbances caused by noise during your stay; this is certainly not what we want for our guests' experience. Best regards, Osin Landek Reservations - Pondok Nyoman Bedugul

review_text_liked: - Vistas bonitas - Habitación grande y limpia
review_text_disliked: - LO PEOR: la sensación de ESTAFA al hacernos pagar 600.000 RDI por un viaje de taxi local (ahí no puedes usar GOJEK/GRAB y lo normal serían 400.000RDI), hasta Kintamani, que a pesar de ser un trayecto largo, el precio fue super elevado comparado con otros trayectos. Me arruinó la estancia la sonrisita que se le escapó a la casera cuando aceptamos, ya que la otra opción era un taxi que nos pidió 850.000RDI (ahora creo que era algo pactado, porque no intentó ni negociar, cosa extraña). Puedo entender que al ser locales pidan mas, pero fue la sensación que SE RIERON EN NUESTRA CARA y se aprovecharon de nosotros. Luego el chico que nos llevó muy amable e intentó calmar el ambiente pidiendo incluso una foto sonriendo al final, pero una cosa no quita la otra. - La entrada es caótica y da mala impresión - Nos alquilaron una NMAX por 150.000 RDI que no tenía ni bocina (elemental para conducir por aquí) con unos “cascos” que casi mejor no llevar nada.

owner_resp_text: Dear Marina, Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback regarding your recent stay with us. We sincerely apologize for the negative experiences you encountered, particularly concerning the transportation arrangements and scooter rental. We understand how frustrating it can be to feel taken advantage of when it comes to pricing, especially in an unfamiliar area. Your comments about the taxi fare have been noted, and we will address this issue with our team to ensure transparency and fairness in all future dealings with local transport services. Regarding your experience upon arrival, we are sorry that our entrance did not meet your expectations; we strive for a welcoming atmosphere from the moment our guests arrive, and we appreciate your input on this matter. Additionally, we regret that the NMAX scooter did not meet safety standards due to missing equipment like a horn and inadequate helmets. Your safety is our priority, and we will review our rental procedures to ensure all vehicles are properly maintained. We value your feedback as it helps us improve our services for future guests. Thank you once again for bringing these issues to our attention. Best regards, Osin Landek Reservations - Pondok Nyoman Bedugul

review_text_liked: Das einzige was uns gefallen hat war die Aussicht ansonsten war das Zimmer eine einzige Katastrophe. Es war schimmelig und entspricht überhaupt nicht den Bildern auf der Seite. Wir hätten uns die Mühe machen müssen weiter die Bewertungen zu lesen dann hätten wir es erkannt. Es werden da noch einige Häuser neu gebaut ich würde vorschlagen erstmal die alten renovieren aber es geht hier nur um Profit. Für uns absolut nicht zu empfehlen ein Graus. Das einzige was positiv zu bewerten ist ,ist die Aussicht. Man muss allerdings über einen Schotterweg 100 m laufen um zu Unterkunft zu kommen das ist schon eine Herausforderung. Ansonsten hat der Ort selber natürlich nichts zu bieten aber auch rein gar nicht s Es gibt ein nettes Warung das würden wir sogar empfehlen. Es ist oben auf dem Berg ca 200 m von dieser Unterkunft. Gegenüber ist auch ein Markt wo man was einkaufen kann. Handtücher wurden auch nicht gewechselt morgens wo wir aber noch mit leben können.

owner_resp_text: Dear Maule, Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback regarding your recent stay with us. We sincerely apologize for the issues you encountered during your visit, as it is our goal to provide all guests with a comfortable and enjoyable experience. We are particularly concerned about your comments regarding the condition of your room. It is unacceptable that you found it moldy and not representative of what was advertised online. We take such matters seriously and will investigate this further to ensure that our accommodations meet high standards. Your suggestion about renovating older properties is appreciated, and we will certainly consider this as part of our ongoing efforts to improve our facilities. Additionally, we regret any inconvenience caused by accessing the accommodation via the gravel path; we understand how this could be challenging. Thank you once again for bringing these matters to our attention. We hope you'll give us another chance in the future so we can provide you with an experience that meets your expectations. Best regards, Osin Landek Reservations - Pondok Nyoman Bedugul

review_text_liked: Widoki
review_text_disliked: Miejsce pełne wszystkiego. Dom na domie. Strefa masażu w miejscu, gdzie wszyscy chodzą, biegają, rozmawiają - zero odprężenia. W domkach przy suficie, otwarte przestrzenie, przez co od wczesnych godzin porannych słychać było biegające dzieci. Kuchnia średnia. Oszukali nas przy podsumowaniu rachunku (nocleg, jedzenie, skuter), po napisaniu maila, z prośbą o zwrot, bo zaszło nieporozumienie, otrzymałam arogancką odpowiedź. Nawet nie przeprosili za błąd.

review_text_liked: Chambre d'hôte chez l'habitant dans un beau jardin arborés et avec de nombreuses fleurs. La vue à l'arrière est vraiment magnifique, on voit les rizières au loin. Les habitants sont gentils et il y plein d'animaux: chiens, chats, poules, poisosns etc
review_text_disliked: L'emplacement de la chambre d'hôte, le chemin pour y accéder est compliqué donc un accès difficile. De plus l'endroit en lui même est un grande route très passante est très dangereuse. Il y a deux restaurant qui ferment tôt, l'un fait sont dernier service à 17h30 pour fermé à 18h. Le second ou jusque un peu plus tard. Pour le logement globalement cela allait, sauf qu'étant chez l'habitant les coqs chantent dés 5h du matin et le chien de la maison aboie la nuit vers 1h du matin pendant facilement 20 minutes. Au point que je suis allée le voir pour savoir si tout allait bien. Autant pour les coqs il n'y a rien à faire, mais il serait judicieux que les habitant prennent leur chien avec eux, il semblait avoir besoin de compagnie et après être allée le voir il n'a plus aboyé. Bref qualité de sommeil très mauvaise avec de multiples reveils. Le petit déjeuner très très long à arriver, vous pouvez compter 20 minutes au moins avant le service et il n'y a pas grand chose à manger quand le petit déjeuner est compris.

review_title: No es muy difícil encontrar algo mejor que esto
review_text_liked: El camino al hotel era muy estrecho, de tierra y sin iluminación, tienes que andar unos 5 minutos para llegar con todas las maletas. Cuando llegamos y dejamos las cosas nos dimos cuenta que no era la habitación que habíamos reservado puesto que la nuestra era Deluxe con una cama y está era de 2 camas. Le comentamos que ya que se habían confundido de habitación y no queríamos volver a mover todo el equipaje si nos podían ofrecer el desayuno para compensar y nos dijeron que sí, al día siguiente salíamos a las 6:30 a.m y no había nadie ni nos habían preparado el desayuno que nos prometieron. La habitación no tenía espejo en el baño, la ducha estaba al aire libre, la habitación llena de hormigas y el único enchufe detrás del cabecero de la cama que no se podía ni meter un cargador. La piscina era bonita, lo que no te dicen es que hay 100 libélulas gigantes volando sobre ella y lo último que te apetece es meterte a bañarte, ya que además está bastante sucia. Para rematar estaban haciendo obras y había muchísimos golpes. Si alguien reserva aquí para ir a los arrozales mi consejo es que no lo haga, buscar un hotel aunque sea más lejos y contratar una excursión para ir y volver.

review_title: El hotel bien, los servicios mejorables
review_text_liked: La habitación era muy tranquila y con unas vistas espectaculares, a destacar la limpieza de la misma y la comodidad de la cama.
review_text_disliked: Ya habíamos leído algún comentario al respecto, pero aun así quisimos ir. Desde el primer momento te intentan vender todo, que si los Grab no llegan a esa zona, para colocarte ellos el taxi, que si las cascadas están muy lejos, etc. Nosotros alquilamos una moto y nos dieron una que se caía a cachos. Pero lo que realmente más nos molestó fue a la hora de cenar cuando 1h y 30 después de haber pedido no habían sido capaces ni de ponernos la bebida, nos levantamos para preguntar que pasaba y todo el personal estaba bebiendo cervezas y chupitos y no habían pasado la comanda a cocina. Nos fuimos muy enfadados de allí a cenar donde pudimos.

review_text_liked: Le lieux est très calme et paisible. Le personnel est sympa et réactif. Il y a différents endroits pour se reposer et admirer la vue ce qui est très appréciable. Il y a également un espace fitness et massage! La situation géographique du lieu est plutôt pratique pour faire différentes visites cependant il n’est pas très facile d’accès.
review_text_disliked: Les draps de lits étaient tachés, dû à l’humidité? Il y a un espace sous la porte de la chambre, ce qui laisse les petites bêtes entrer, nous avons malheureusement fait la rencontre d’une limace en revenant dans notre chambre :(

review_text_liked: La superbe vue sur les rizières est bien le seul point positif de cet établissement
review_text_disliked: Par où commencer ? Entre l’attente interminable (plus d’une heure) pour avoir deux plats alors que nous sommes les seuls dans l’établissement; les portions absolument ridicules du petit déjeuné et de certains plats (même un enfant aurait encore faim); l’odeur insupportable d’humidité et de moisie cachée par un faux plafonds dans la salle de bain ou encore les insectes dans la chambre tels qu’une grosse araignée, insectes volants ou fourmis; il vaut mieux rester seulement pour un très très court séjour
